nodes.context: Neo-Nazi terrorist organization based in Alberta, Canada, primarily in Calgary. Founded late 2006, reported disbanded in 2009.
White supremacist group; member Tyler Sturrup was targeted by Aryan Guard bomb attack.

edges.evidence_quote: On the morning of November 21, 2009, two homemade bombs were left on the doorstep of WEB (Western European Bloodline) member Tyler Sturrup.
edges.context: Aryan Guard members bombed a WEB member's home, indicating conflict.
